summary: Both edit save(); I'll add dry_run kwarg popped early (before open_fp branch) and use io.BytesIO() as fp when dry_run=True, skipping real file open/close/remove logic - should not conflict with backup/backup_suffix additions if you keep your changes in the open_fp branch and the file-create/remove logic; I'll rebase around your diff if needed
